MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-29-28 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant M. Rawson To Respond To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Sep-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - Plaintiff Ruben Martinez's Motion To Compel Defendant Michael Rawson's Response To Plaintiff's Demand For Production Of Documents And Things, Set No. One, and for Sanctions is GRANTED.

The discovery requests at issue appear reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2017.010.) The record demonstrates Defendant Michael Rawson did not provide any responses to the RFPs. No meet and confer requirement exists for motions to compel responses for requests for production of documents when no responses have been provided. (Code of Civil Procedure section 2031.300.)

Defendant Michael Rawson shall serve verified, objection-free, responses to Plaintiff's RFPs, Set One by September 25, 2025.

Defendant Michael Rawson did not act with substantial justification in connection with this discovery. Defendant Michael Rawson shall pay $860 to Plaintiffs as sanctions, payment no later than September 25, 2025. (See Code of Civil Procedure 2031.300(c).)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
